name: Veg Thali (Regular)
servingSize: 2 roti + dal + 2 sabzi + rice + salad + curd

name: Veg Thali (Special/Big)
servingSize: 3 roti + dal + 3 sabzi + rice + sweet + papad + raita

name: Non-Veg Thali (Regular)
servingSize: 2 roti + non-veg curry + dal + rice + salad

name: Non-Veg Thali (Special/Big)
servingSize: 3 roti + non-veg curry + dal + sabzi + rice + raita + sweet

name: Chicken Thali (Regular)
servingSize: 2 roti + chicken curry + dal + rice + salad

name: Chicken Thali (Special/Big)
servingSize: 3 roti + chicken curry + dal + sabzi + rice + raita + sweet

name: Mutton Thali (Regular)
servingSize: 2 roti + mutton curry + dal + rice + salad

name: Mutton Thali (Special/Big)
servingSize: 3 roti + mutton curry + dal + sabzi + rice + raita + sweet

name: Fish Thali (Regular)
servingSize: 2 roti + fish curry + dal + rice + salad

name: Fish Thali (Special/Big)
servingSize: 3 roti + fish curry + dal + sabzi + rice + raita + sweet

name: Egg Thali (Small)
servingSize: 1 roti + egg curry (1 egg) + small rice

name: Egg Thali (Regular)
servingSize: 2 roti + egg curry (2 eggs) + dal + rice + salad

name: Egg Thali (Special/Big)
servingSize: 3 roti + egg curry + dal + sabzi + rice + raita + sweet

name: Paneer Thali (Regular)
servingSize: 2 roti + paneer sabzi + dal + rice + salad + curd

name: Paneer Thali (Special/Big)
servingSize: 3 roti + paneer curry + dal + sabzi + rice + raita + sweet + papad

name: Dal Thali (Regular)
servingSize: 2 roti + dal + sabzi + rice + salad + curd

name: Dal Thali (Special/Big)
servingSize: 3 roti + dal + 2 sabzi + rice + raita + sweet + papad

name: South Indian Thali (Regular)
servingSize: Rice + sambar + rasam + 2 poriyal + curd + appalam

name: South Indian Thali (Special)
servingSize: Rice + sambar + rasam + 3 poriyal + avial + curd + payasam + appalam

name: Gujarati Thali (Regular)
servingSize: 2 roti + dal + 2 sabzi + rice + kadhi + salad + curd

name: Gujarati Thali (Special)
servingSize: 3 roti + dal + 3 sabzi + rice + kadhi + farsan + sweet + chhash

name: Rajasthani Thali (Regular)
servingSize: 2 roti + panchmel dal + gatte sabzi + rice + papad

name: Rajasthani Thali (Special)
servingSize: Dal bati churma + 2 sabzi + rice + papad + sweet + chhash

name: Punjabi Thali (Regular)
servingSize: 2 naan + paneer/chole + dal makhani + rice + salad + raita

name: Punjabi Thali (Special)
servingSize: 3 naan + paneer + dal makhani + chole + rice + raita + sweet

name: Bengali Thali (Small)
servingSize: Rice + dal + 1 sabzi + small fish fry

name: Bengali Thali (Regular)
servingSize: Rice + dal + 2 sabzi + fish curry + chutney

name: Bengali Thali (Special)
servingSize: Rice + dal + 3 sabzi + fish curry + chutney + mishti doi + papad

name: Maharashtrian Thali (Special)
servingSize: 4 bhakri + 2 sabzi + usal + varan + rice + papad + sweet + sol kadhi

name: Kerala Thali (Regular)
servingSize: Rice + sambar + 2 thoran + avial + rasam + olan + curd

name: Kerala Sadya (Special)
servingSize: Rice + sambar + 3 thoran + avial + erissery + rasam + payasam + banana + appalam

name: Andhra Thali (Regular)
servingSize: Rice + pappu + 2 curries + rasam + pachadi + curd

name: Andhra Thali (Special)
servingSize: Rice + pappu + 3 curries + rasam + pachadi + curd + sweet + appalam

name: Kashmiri Thali (Regular)
servingSize: Rice + rogan josh/dum aloo + haak saag + raita

name: Kashmiri Wazwan (Special)
servingSize: Rice + rogan josh + dum aloo + haak saag + gushtaba + sheer chai + naan

name: North Indian Thali (Regular)
servingSize: 2 roti + dal + 2 sabzi + rice + salad + raita

name: North Indian Thali (Special)
servingSize: 3 roti + dal + 3 sabzi + rice + raita + sweet + papad + salad

name: Mini Meals / Executive Thali
servingSize: 1 roti + dal + 1 sabzi + small rice + salad

name: Diet Thali / Healthy Thali
servingSize: 1 multigrain roti + dal + sabzi (no oil) + brown rice + salad + curd

name: Chettinad Thali (Veg)
servingSize: Rice + kozhambu + rasam + poriyal + appalam + curd

name: Chettinad Thali (Non-Veg Special)
servingSize: Rice + chicken chettinad + rasam + 2 poriyal + appalam + curd + payasam
